fields.name: Terracotta Sunset Cat Beanie
fields.desc: Hand-crocheted cat ear hat featuring a warm gradient of burnt orange, dusty rose, and moss green. Includes functional braided chin ties.

fields.name: Ocean Mist Cat Beanie
fields.desc: A cool-toned beanie with structured cat ears. The yarn transitions through slate blue, sage green, and sandy gold.

fields.name: Midnight Ember Cat Beanie
fields.desc: Dark and cozy. This beanie features deep chocolate browns mixed with charcoal and hints of brick red.

fields.name: Cherry Bomb Cat Beanie
fields.desc: A vibrant, solid-colored statement piece. High-definition crochet stitches in a bright true red.

fields.name: Enchanted Forest Cat Beanie
fields.desc: Earthy and whimsical. A complex blend of forest green, deep purple, and heather grey.

fields.name: Lavender Haze Beanie
fields.desc: Soft pastel lavender with silver threading. Features the signature cat-ear silhouette.

fields.name: Black Onyx Cat Beanie
fields.desc: A sleek, all-black crochet beanie. Perfect for a subtle gothic or alternative look.

fields.name: Sunflower Field Beanie
fields.desc: Bright yellow accents on a chocolate brown base. Reminiscent of a summer garden.

fields.name: Winter Frost Beanie
fields.desc: Pure white chunky yarn with a slight shimmer. Very thick and warm for snow days.

fields.name: Spiced Chai Beanie
fields.desc: Neutral cream and tan stripes. A versatile piece that goes with any autumn outfit.

fields.name: Teal Wave Beanie
fields.desc: Rich peacock teal with a sturdy ribbed edge to keep the hat securely in place.

fields.name: Candy Floss Beanie
fields.desc: Bright bubblegum pink. Great for kids or anyone looking to add a pop of color.

fields.name: Mustard Seed Beanie
fields.desc: Trendy mustard yellow in a dense honeycomb stitch. Very breathable but warm.

fields.name: Stormy Sky Beanie
fields.desc: Various shades of grey and silver heathered together for a textured look.

fields.name: Mossy Rock Beanie
fields.desc: Olive green and grey yarn. Designed for hikers and nature lovers.
